Topic.name: PageSet
Topic.summary: Gets or sets the pages to render. Default is all the pages in the document.

Topic.name: UseBookFoldPrintingSettings
Topic.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value indicating whether the document should be saved using a booklet printing layout, if it is specified via .

remarks.para: If this option is specified, is ignored when saving. This behavior matches MS Word. If book fold printing settings are not specified in page setup, this option will have no effect.
